name: Case Study Example
history: Recent move and stress related to settling into a new living space. Difficult relationship with parents, especially mother, described as judgmental and emotionally unsupportive. Friendships have become strained, contributing to isolation.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: I must meet others' expectations to be accepted.
intermediate_belief_depression: If I don't meet expectations, I will be rejected.
coping_strategies: Avoidance of conflict and seeking reassurance from others.
situation: Preparing for a conversation with mother and expecting it to be challenging and superficial.
auto_thought: She will criticize me, and I won't be able to handle it.
behavior: Attempts to avoid confrontation and seeks to please others.
